subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! The True One, glorified be His majesty, saith: O My handmaiden and daughter of My handmaiden! Thy letter hath come before Me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله حق جل جلاله میفرماید ای کنیز من و فرزند کنیز من نامه ات لدی الوجه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
